reference: Hi, I understand your concerns. Looking at your sonography, it appears normal. I think you will not have any problem conceiving, as one ovary appears to have a follicle that can ovulate, and your endometrial thickness is within the normal range. Continue your follicular study and get back to us.
text: Hi, I understand your concerns. Looking at your sonography, it appears normal. I think you will not have any problems with you, as one ovary appears to have a follicle that nodules, and your endometrial system is completely immortalized. Continue your follicular study and get back to me.
